Comment: As an advisor he is awful, but he a very knowledgeable professor. He knows everything about Engineering and topics in its perimeter so you will def learn useful stuff there. Tests are fair. Once you get used to him, he is nice to students. Although does not grade back so grades are a mystery until semester ends and too much homework imo.
Tags: Lots of homework, Skip class? You won't pass., Lecture heavy

Comment: Just ignore his jokes, focus on what he is teaching, and you will be fine. He is knowledgeable in the field of engineering in general, so as a freshman it was nice to be able to ask him to explain the differences between aerospace and mechanical etc.
Funniest professor I have had in a while
Tags: Gives good feedback, LOTS OF HOMEWORK, Hilarious
